description_long: This is a tall, narrow restaurant building with a whimsical, eclectic design. The facade features a mix of pastel colors, with a blue roof, white walls, and various awnings and balconies in green, red, and beige. A prominent 'ristorante' sign in orange letters is mounted on poles in front, and a small outdoor dining area with a table and chairs is set up on the sidewalk. The building has multiple windows, some with shutters and others with striped awnings, and a decorative spire on one side. Architectural details include a small balcony, a rooftop dormer, and a lantern hanging near the entrance.
description: A tall, pastel-colored restaurant with a playful facade, outdoor seating, and a bold 'ristorante' sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'ristorante' sign, main entrance, outdoor table, and colorful awnings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, green awning, and lantern near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal detail, showing the plain back wall and part of the balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a small balcony, window, and a clear look at the building's vertical shape.
attribute_signage: Large orange 'ristorante' sign in lowercase letters mounted on poles in front of the building.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is playful and colorful, featuring a mix of pastel tones, striped awnings, and a variety of window shapes and balconies. Architectural details include a blue gabled roof, a rooftop dormer, and a decorative spire. The overall style is eclectic, with whimsical ornamentation and a prominent, stylized sign.
